title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Whitebeard Pirates, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Oden, Rayleigh as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From the clouds of Skypica, the crew safely returned to the sea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And set sail to a ship- builder's city...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Really? You have a stone in your country? What color is it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the type I'm looking for! You should've told me earlier dammit!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We stole a rubbing from big mom's poneyGlyph and i have a feeling

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: About where another one might be!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is this a gift from the heavens?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have all road ponyglyphs within my reach!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Tom! I've been wanting to see you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you kidding me? It's still being designed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're an orphan? wanna come with us?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want anything to do with you pirates

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They are as loud as ever

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were abandoned by Pirates? You're a funny kid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's go to the amusement parks!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a big chance we'll die on the way to the REAL fishman island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: heard what? We're 10,000 leagues under the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pretty sure I also heard some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Where is all this noise coming from?!

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Roger? I could barely recognize you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you the one making all this noise?

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 50 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
